CustomField.description: This field is calculated based on the FH and FC values entered in the utilization. It remains unchanged even if the Effective Ratio is modified by an assumed or overridden ratio.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is calculated based on the FH and FC values entered in the utilization. It remains unchanged even if the Effective Ratio is modified by an assumed or overridden ratio.
CustomField.label: Calculated FH:FC Ratio
